mission.title: cert-manager: Ingress routes for challenges created with pathType: ImplementationSpecific not working with Cilium
mission.description: Ingress routes for challenges created with pathType: ImplementationSpecific not working with Cilium. This issue affects 18+ users.

steps.title: Identify cert-manager troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your cert-manager deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review cert-manager configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant cert-manager configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager
kubectl get configmap -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cert-manager
```
Basically the opposite of #4371

Not sure if BUG or Feature Request

With Cilium and l2announcer one need to use the edit inline feature, because otherwise it will create new LoadBalancers with new IPs.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Ingress routes for challenges created with pathType:…
steps.description:
Fixes cert-manager/cert-manager#6805

### Pull Request Motivation

cert-manager's acme http challenge accidentally uses Ingress pathType `ImplementationSpecific`, when it should use the more specific and secure `Exact` one. 

Kubernetes Ingress controllers vary in implementation of the `ImplementationSpecific` pathType, which will make the deterministic behaviour of cert-manager unreliable depending on the ingress controller that is used. Eg. Cilium Ingress.

### Kind

### Release Note

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Confirm Ingress routes for challenges created with… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
Fixes cert-manager/cert-manager#6805

### Pull Request Motivation

cert-manager's acme http challenge accidentally uses Ingress pathType `ImplementationSpecific`, when it should use the more specific and secure `Exact` one.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with cert-manager installed or the issue environment reproducible.
